1703270.name: Roundguard Original Soundtrack
1703270.description:
The Roundguard soundtrack includes all the music from the game, plus a few bonus tracks from earlier in the project, if you wanna peek behind the curtain a bit and hear some prototype content that I scrapped before shipping.

Includes mp3 and high quality WAV files for all songs.

About the Game:
Roundguard is a bouncy dungeon crawler with pinball physics, lots of loot, and a randomized castle full of oddballs. Press your luck against hordes of dangerously cute monsters and challenging roguelike elements in this all-round bouncy adventure!
